sections.paragraph:
ὕβρις, εως, ἡ [origin uncertain; primary sense: ‘wanton violence’ w. focus on insolence] ‘experience of wanton disregard for well-being’, the pass. aspect of ὑβ.

—a. as abusive treatment indignity, mistreatment 2 Cor 12:10.

—b. by ext. as experience of loss inflicted by stormy weather damage Ac 27:10, 21.
